headline: Why The Trade Desk (TTD) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of digital advertising platform The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) fell 6.2% in the afternoon session after the company reported mixed first-quarter results and issued a disappointing second-quarter revenue forecast, signaling a slowdown in growth.
